/CAL: TRIAL, LD 06-14-21/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-14-21/X: BAIL SET AT $40,000/VD: LD 06-14-21 AND TRIAL/CONTD: BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: ALL WITNESS WERE SWORN AND EXAMINED ON 8-10-20/X: EXHIBITS WERE OFFERED & ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE ON 8-10-20/X: DEFENSE'SORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNTS TO MISDEMEANOR 17(B)PC IS:/MO DENIED/HTA1:1 AND ATTACHED ALLEGATION OF GBI, 2 AND 3/X: AS A CONDITION TO REMAIN OUTOF CUSTODY:/WS/WEAP/X: NOT POSSESS FIREARMS OR KNIVES OF ANY KIND/CTORD:THE 7-6-20 PROTECTIVE ORDER WILL BE READDRESSED AT ARRAIGNMENT/X: DEFENSE MAKES ORAL MOTION TO HAVE GPS DEVICE REMOVED/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE GPS DEVICEORDERED ON 7-6-20 IS TO BE REMOVED FORTHWITH/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL/WIT SWORN:OFFICER FRANK BUSALACCHI; OFICER NATHALIE PERAZA; OFFICER      HAVA MCCARTER; SGT,JEFFREY CAMILOSA;/EXHMA: P1-PHOTO OF AN INJURED HAND; P2 - CD; VIDEO FOOTAGE FROM     LATINO'SLIQUOR STORE   / /CONT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:08-17-20/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVEBY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:IGNACIO TAMAYO/SA1:HECTOR QUEVEDO/SA2:3249 24TH ST,, S,F, CA/SA2:2577 MISSION ST,, S,F, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
